physicalDetails.detail: Too young for the room he is working in, with ink dried into the ridges of his fingers, ward pigment worked into his cuffs, and sleepless hollows under his eyes.

voiceMarkers.detail: Precise, overprepared, and worn down by bureaucracy. He gives dates, receipt points, and procedural failures in clipped sequence, as if he has had to make the case too many times already.

beliefs.belief: If he can document the tainted shipments cleanly enough, the right office should eventually be forced to act.
beliefs.trueOrFalse: Disproved emotionally by chapter7; the paperwork was strong and still buried.

beliefs.belief: The magical layer of Andorhal has been warning itself for weeks, even if no one senior has chosen to listen.

goalsAtChapterEnd.active: Provide access, maps, and records for the same-night operation, then hold the office and its files while Jaina and Sylvanas move on the cell.
goalsAtChapterEnd.underlying: Turn weeks of ignored proof into action before the cult realizes it has been mapped.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Relieved, frightened, and finally useful in company. He still expects institutions to fail, but not these specific people.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: Shows Jaina and Sylvanas his copied manifests, receipt-point board, and tied-lattice test results instead of guarding them against another dismissal.
Fetches Havel into the investigation, secures the mage-quarter seal Jaina needs, and later offers access-side support for the night operation.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: Builds a usable case out of copied manifests, route marks, and receipt-point tracking over weeks of neglect.
Uses ward pigment and tied-lattice detection to follow taint from specific inner sacks through downstream flour and bakehouse output.

howOthersAddressHim.speaker: Jaina Proudmoore
howOthersAddressHim.pattern: Uses Corin directly, in brisk collegial form once she understands the quality of his work.

howHeAddressesOthers.pattern: Proudmoore at first, the respectful form of a junior mage finally speaking to someone senior enough to matter.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: Locks his jaw against visible relief, moves fastest when there is work to explain, and crowds the table only once someone finally matches his evidence with action.

knowledge.detail: Three contaminated receipt points sit inside the granary district, and at least three listed origins on the manifests do not exist while two others sit on Barov land without yet proving Barov direction.
The hidden symbol on the inner sacks is consistent enough to be deliberate, and the taint survives milling into downstream flour.
His notices have been ignored by the inspection committee, the district prefect, and Dalaran alike for weeks.

arc.lie: If the paperwork is clean enough, authority will eventually do its job.
arc.truth: Proof still needs people willing to move on it.
arc.currentPosition: Chapter7 brings him out of isolated documentation and into active alliance. He has not become braver so much as less alone.
